home.title: Software Development Portfolio

introSegments.text: building accessible, well-tested web applications with React, TypeScript, Vue, JavaScript, and a growing Python automation track. I care about clear interfaces, maintainable code, practical testing, and security-aware development. My background in business administration and digital marketing helps me think about

journeyItems: Currently working at OP Pohjola as a Software Developer Trainee, building accessible frontend features with React, TypeScript, SCSS, and design-system components in an international, regulated agile environment.
Also supporting REST API and Java/Spring Boot-related tasks, including maintenance and migration work where needed.
Previously worked on a backend-focused full-stack team project for City of Helsinki / Virittämö, using JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, React, and MongoDB.
Bachelor's degree in Business Administration from the University of Vaasa, major in Marketing and minor in Communications.
Over 180 ECTS credits in Information Technology across Finnish higher-education institutions, including Metropolia University of Applied Sciences and the University of Helsinki.
Completed the Full Stack Open course series at the University of Helsinki and participated in the DEFA project.
Additional studies in DevOps with Docker, Cyber Security, and Python Programming at the University of Helsinki.
ICT degree from Business College Helsinki, graduating in April 2024 with a GPA of 4.95/5.
Personal projects in web development, Python tooling, automation, and accessible user interfaces.

certifications.text: Microsoft Certified: Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals (SC-900)

home.interestingFactText: Outside of coding, I produce music and explore Japanese culture. Those creative interests influence how I approach problem-solving, structure, and small details in user experiences.

drivesSegments.text: I'm currently open to new software developer opportunities where I can contribute to accessible, maintainable web applications and keep growing across modern frontend, full-stack JavaScript, and Python automation.

home.contactEmail: Email me if you would like to discuss a software development role or a relevant project.
home.contactSocial: You can also find me on LinkedIn and GitHub.
home.contactImageAlt: Contact information, reach out via LinkedIn
